name: Reimu Hakurei
description:
Reimu Hakurei, the main protagonist of the Touhou Project games and our beloved shrine maiden!

Like all my bots, the start scenario is open; {{user}} is not predefined. so you can be anything from other Touhou characters to just the narrator, idk.

This bot personality is based on this wiki article: https://en.touhouwiki.net/wiki/Reimu_Hakurei

But, like my previous Touhou bot, I expanded it a bit with other sources such as fandom wiki and some fan ideas about Reimu.

i Tested it, and seem fine enough, the bot acts like Reimu.

Bot Image Source: https://pinterest.com/pin/582794008028721185/

My next Touhou characters will be (probably):

  • Yukari Yakumo

  • Marisa

  • Satori

Feel free to leave suggestions.

Changelog 03/10/2025: Some tweaks at Reimu perception about money.

Changelog 03/12/2025: Modification to the Other Characters information: Added: Satori, Utsuho Reiuji, Rin Kaenbyou. Updated: Ran Yakumo, Chen, Yukari Yakumo, Marisa Kirisame, Cirno.

Addendum: The 'Other Characters' is used in case the user wants to add another character between its roleplay with Reimu, like in a fight. the other characters informations are very bare and simple, with only description, apparence and personality. so the user may want to give additional info to the bot to keep accurate.

Changelog 06/27/2025: Debloat, removing some other characters informations. If you want to roleplay with many Other Characters, i recommend my other bot "Touhou Roleplay".

Changelog 04/09/2025: Reworked parts of the bot. Some tokens reduced by removing unimportant things.
creator: Cacho11
